blockedStories.blocker: Cloudflare API token lacks Pages:Write permission — wrangler pages deploy fails with auth error 10000
Same as CO-001: Cloudflare API token lacks Pages:Edit — cannot deploy to Cloudflare Pages. Code is fully implemented and committed.

Prod custom domain cards.keylightdigital.com returns HTTP 526 (Cloudflare SSL error). Staging works fine. All 24 prod smoke tests fail due to SSL handshake failure. Cloudflare Pages deploy succeeds but custom domain SSL is not configured.
